scope_summary.problem: requirements.md: Add native stdlib test module with TestCase class and basic assertions (assertEqual, assertTrue, assertFalse, assertRaises) plus main() test runner.
scope_summary.success_criteria: Module registers as 'test' in stdlib, provides TestCase class, assertion methods, and main() runner. All existing cclab-mamba tests pass without regressions.

boundary.in_scope: test_mod.rs creation, mod.rs registration, unit tests for all assertion methods
boundary.out_of_scope: test.support sub-module utilities, advanced test discovery, setUp/tearDown lifecycle hooks
boundary.constraints: Must follow existing stdlib module pattern (register() + register_module()), keep under 500 lines
